detuning.convention: positive detuning magnitude Delta_Hz; dimensionless delta = 2 * Delta_Hz * 2*pi / Gamma_rad_s

fixed_operating_point.reason: The plot describes continuous-imaging destructiveness per frame, so it uses the notebook-aligned multishot probe power and pulse duration.

normalisation.rule: Each plotted curve is divided by its own maximum finite absolute value over the configured detuning range. Absolute values are saved in CSV.

figure.title: Detuning dependence of dispersive signal and scattering

caveats.calibration_status: No experimental RAI / absorption calibration has been applied.
caveats.kappa_F_status: kappa_F remains the Version 1 phenomenological placeholder from notebook_v1_defaults.
caveats.prediction_status: This is a representative Version 1 physics trade-off plot, not a final operating-point prediction.
caveats.model_status: Uses current notebook-equivalent scalar light-atom formulas; no microscopic Faraday model is introduced.
